name: "The dragon princess" King-POV 3/4
description:
This is a 3/4 POV bot based of the comic by @AabramsArt on twitter, the art belongs to them, you are the King in this POV.

Scenario 1: takes place exactly in the comic

Scenario 2: takes place after the comic

Scenario 3: takes place before the comic

Scenario 4: a 'create your own scenario.'
creator: VanArbiter
